description_long: This object is a compact, modern record player with a square base and rounded edges, finished in a light pastel color. The central feature is a large, black circular turntable platter with a vinyl record placed on top, and a silver spindle at its center. A straight, slender tonearm extends from the left side, with a small cartridge and stylus at its end, positioned over the record. The right side of the base houses a rectangular control area, likely containing the mechanism for the tonearm and possibly hidden controls. Three small, round buttons are visible on the front right edge, suggesting basic playback or power functions. A transparent, hinged dust cover is attached at the back, currently shown in the open position, providing protection for the platter and tonearm when closed.
description: A modern, pastel-colored record player with a black turntable platter, straight tonearm, and a transparent open dust cover. Three small buttons are visible on the front edge, and a vinyl record sits on the platter.
description_view_0: The record player is seen from a front-left angle, showing the black platter, straight tonearm, and the control area on the right.
description_view_1: A direct left-side view highlights the tonearm's full length and the circular platter, with the dust cover's hinge visible at the back.
description_view_2: The rear-right angle emphasizes the tonearm's base and the smooth, rounded edges of the player, with the platter and record clearly visible.
description_view_3: A direct front view displays the three small buttons on the lower right edge and the open dust cover, with the platter and tonearm in clear view.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, large, and circular, occupying most of the top surface. It is black with a central silver spindle and appears to be made of plastic or metal with a smooth, matte finish. The platter is slightly raised above the base and has a vinyl record placed on it. No visible grooves or decorative patterns are present on the platter itself.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, straight, and slender, extending from the left side of the base toward the center of the platter. It is medium-length, with a visible joint at the base and a small cartridge at the end. The tonearm appears to be made of metal or plastic, colored in a dark or metallic shade, and is currently resting over the record.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is present, attached to the end of the tonearm. It is small and pointed, likely made of metal or a composite material, and appears as a distinct component at the cartridge's tip.
attribute_control_knobs: Three small, round buttons are visible on the front right edge of the base. They are evenly spaced, made of plastic, and colored to match the base. No visible labels or markings are present.
attribute_dust_cover: A dust cover is present, made of transparent material, likely acrylic or polycarbonate. It is hinged at the back and currently shown in the open position, covering the entire top area when closed. The cover is colorless and has no visible handles or additional features.
